---
title: "About"
---

## Who am I ?

Statistical programmer in the pharmaceutical industry. I work with R daily — CDISC standards, ADaM datasets, TLFs.

Outside of pharma, I apply R to sports analytics and finance.

## Skills

-   R / tidyverse / ggplot2
-   R Shiny
-   CDISC / ADaM / TLFs
-   Git / GitHub
-   Quarto
